content.rendered:
Study Abroad

Study in United Kingdom (UK)

Get a Consultation
Download Brochure
Study in United Kingdom (UK)

why studying in the UK is so appealing​

The UK is renowned for being one of the most inclusive and multicultural countries in the world. Studying in the UK is a dream for many students, as the country boasts the sixth-largest economy globally.

According to the Higher Education Statistics Agency (HESA), the UK ranks as the second most popular study destination worldwide.

UK universities boast a rich heritage, with prestigious institutions such as Oxford and Cambridge having histories that span over 800 years. According to the QS World University Rankings 2020, nearly 20% of the world’s top 50 universities are located in the UK

Globally recognized universities

known for their high-quality education.

A vast selection of study fields and institutions

to suit diverse interests.

Cost-effective education

thanks to shorter course durations that reduce tuition and accommodation expenses.

part-time work

Opportunities for part-time work alongside studies.

Post-study work opportunities

For international students.

Get in Touch

Reach out now to embark on your journey to a new life overseas with the expert assistance of our committed immigration professionals

  • Building #22 Second Floor khayaban e Iqbal sector XX DHA Phase 3 Lahore
  • advisor.edu@forecastmigration.com
  • +92-3111-822226
Facebook Instagram Linkedin

Request A Quote
